FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct ItemRun

Namespace
FluentGpu.Text
Assembly
FluentGpu.Text.dll

One itemized run: a maximal span of the text with a single BiDi level AND a single script — the unit the shaper consumes (one run = one face/script/direction). Produced by intersecting the BiDi-level runs with the script runs. ScriptId/ScriptShapes are the opaque DirectWrite script id + shaping flags, carried as portable scalars so this seam stays Windows/COM-free.

public readonly record struct ItemRun : IEquatable<ItemRun>
Implements
IEquatable<ItemRun>
Inherited Members

ValueType.GetHashCode()
ValueType.ToString()

object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Constructors

ItemRun(int, int, byte, ushort, byte)

One itemized run: a maximal span of the text with a single BiDi level AND a single script — the unit the shaper consumes (one run = one face/script/direction). Produced by intersecting the BiDi-level runs with the script runs. ScriptId/ScriptShapes are the opaque DirectWrite script id + shaping flags, carried as portable scalars so this seam stays Windows/COM-free.

public ItemRun(int Start, int Length, byte BidiLevel, ushort ScriptId, byte ScriptShapes)

Length int

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
